title: IceBoatQOL
description: My mod pack. Used for boat racing. Very helpful for ice-boating
body:
![IceBoatQOL Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/753676f87f2830216cf8d1dc191c51d17380e820.png) The IceBoatQOL modpack is designed to enhance your Minecraft experience by combining hand selected mods, focused on high performance for boat racing. The combinations of mods in this modpack is aimed to be as fast and convenient as possible for the best possible experience. Key Ice Boating mods in this pack include OpenBoatUtils, which allows servers to customize boating physics, Boat Tweaks, which allows for more customization in Singleplayer and hosted worlds to play with friends, and other boating mods. IceBoatQOL is built to be customizable, so you can easily improve your experience by adding other mods you enjoy. Updates are rolled out quickly to ensure compatibility with the latest Minecraft versions and the newest performance mods.
